settings.label: Enable Filtering
settings.description: Allow visitors to filter {postType} items by selected criteria

settings.label: Multiple Selection
settings.description: When enabled, allows visitors to select multiple options within the same filter group

settings.label: Filter By
settings.description: Which criteria visitors can filter items by

settings.label: Date Filter Type
settings.description: Which date to use for filtering

settings.label: Position
settings.description: Where to display the filter controls

settings.label: Display
settings.description: Whether the filter bar is always visible or revealed by a toggle button

settings.label: Sidebar Side
settings.description: Which side the filter sidebar appears on

settings.label: Style
settings.description: How the filter controls are displayed

settings.label: Filter Panel Background
settings.description: Background colour of the filter panel itself

settings.label: "All" Label
settings.description: Text for the reset control that shows all items

settings.label: Filter Panel Padding
settings.description: Padding inside the Filter Panel itself

settings.label: Gap Between Bar and {postType}
settings.description: Space between the Filter Panel and the {postType} grid

settings.label: Gap Between Groups
settings.description: Space between filter groups (e.g. Tags row and People row)

settings.label: Gap Between Controls
settings.description: Space between individual buttons, options, or checkboxes within a group

settings.label: Sidebar Width
settings.description: Width of the filter column when position is set to Sidebar

settings.label: Separator Color
settings.description: 1px line drawn between options. Set to transparent to hide.

settings.label: Size
settings.description: Width and height of the checkbox box

settings.label: Border Radius
settings.description: 0 = square, 50% equivalent = circle

settings.label: Gap to Label
settings.description: Space between the checkbox box and its label text

settings.label: Checkmark
settings.description: Rendered semi-transparently on hover to preview the checked state

settings.label: Checkmark
settings.description: Color of the tick mark inside a checked box

settings.label: Show Item Count
settings.description: Display the number of matching items next to each filter option

messages.subtitle: Advanced EXIF & Metadata Filtering
messages.message: Filter by camera settings (ISO, aperture, shutter speed), file properties (size, dimensions), and other EXIF data to find exactly what you're looking for.

messages.subtitle: People & Location Filtering
messages.message: Filter {postType.lower.plural} by recognized people or locations. Perfect for event photography, family albums, and location-based collections.

messages.subtitle: Smart Filter Presets & Dynamic Filtering
messages.message: Save your favorite filter combinations as presets for quick access, and enable real-time filtering that updates results as users type or select options.
